stories.title: RBC Heritage Round 1 Underway — Scheffler Seeks Post-Masters Bounce Back (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Golf is BACK.

RBC Heritage Round 1 is underway at Harbour Town.

Scottie Scheffler — +390 favorite — is playing his first event since finishing ONE SHOT behind McIlroy at the Masters.

He wants this one. Badly. #GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Justin Thomas is defending his 2025 RBC Heritage title at Harbour Town.

Viktor Hovland is the name to watch for a breakout week.

And Russell Henley — T3 Masters — has a 67.42 avg at Harbour Town over 12 rounds.

This leaderboard is going to be FUN. #GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage

stories.title: LIV Golf in Crisis — PIF May Cut Funding as Mexico City Event Opens (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf Mexico City tees off TODAY.

Sportico: Saudi PIF considering CUTTING funding after $5B+ investment.

LIV CEO: Season goes on "uninterrupted." Players hoping for a merger.

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Bryson DeChambeau is chasing his THIRD straight LIV Golf victory this week in Mexico City.

5 individual wins. 15 total trophies. Most in LIV history.

He's been absolutely ON FIRE — and he's doing it while the league's future hangs in the balance. #GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

stories.title: McIlroy's Masters Legacy — Back-to-Back Wins Put Him in Elite Company (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The only players to win back-to-back Masters:

Jack Nicklaus.
Nick Faldo.
Tiger Woods.
Rory McIlroy.

That is the list. That is how exclusive the company is.

A 71 on Sunday at Augusta to hold off Scheffler by one shot. Historic. #GolfFanrecap #TheMasters

article.headline: The Company He Keeps: McIlroy's Back-to-Back Masters Win Puts Him With Nicklaus, Faldo, and Tiger

stories.title: LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship Opens — Hyo Joo Kim Enters as Tour's Hottest Player (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship starts TODAY at El Caballero CC.

Hyo Joo Kim enters as the hottest player in women's golf — 2 straight LPGA wins, two rounds of 61.

One week before the Chevron Championship (first women's major of 2026).

The warmup begins. #GolfFanrecap #LPGA

stories.title: The Case for Russell Henley at the RBC Heritage (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Russell Henley's stroke average at Harbour Town over 12 rounds: 67.42.

He just posted a T3 finish at the Masters — best major result of his career.

He WON the 2024 RBC Heritage at this exact course.

The smart money this week is on Henley. #GolfFanrecap #RBCHeritage
